text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice two Umamusume<n>getting ready
for some pair running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a good session today,<n>Ryan. I'm
going to run like it's the<n>real thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! I'm with you on that one!<n>I'm real
excited about running<n>together, completely free!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The onlooking Umamusume begin to<n>rouse with
excitement as the two<n>racers pump themselves
up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look! Those two are from the<n>Mejiro family!
Doesn't it seem like<n>they're taking this pretty...
seriously?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Are they about to run together? I've<n>gotta see
this up close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... We've got a few eyes on<n>us. I'm
starting to get nervous. What<n>abou—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, s-sorry. Did you say something<n>just now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Whenever I'm super nervous, I find<n>that it's
easier to focus when I think<n>about my favorite
things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So when my nerves get to me, I think<n>about how
my muscles expand and<n>contract... How about
giving that a<n>shot?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. I'll try to keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Any time! All right, let's hit the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I don't like the thought of not being<n>able to
match her at her best. I'll stay<n>focused until the
very end!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Strawberries, apples, kiwis,<n>mangoes, bananas,
grapes,<n>pineapples!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Dober's picking up the pace?! Two<n>can play at
that game!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eeeeeeek! Ryan! Dober! Good luck<n>you two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Fruit parfait, parfait, parfait...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: PARFAAAAAIT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I did it? I gave it my best.. to the<n>very end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! That was the bomb!<n>Especially the way
you sped up at<n>the end! You were all over me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Dober! Ryan! That was an amazing<n>race!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A group of Umamusume who were<n>captivated by
the intense race gather<n>around the pair in no time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Your final spurt at the end was<n>super
cool!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The raucous cheers from the crowd<n>slightly take
the edge off Mejiro<n>Dober's run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was doing so well too...Guess I caved in again...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Awesome job there, Dober! You<n>were more
focused than when I try to<n>crush a set!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Dober! Ryan! That was an amazing<n>race!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A group of Umamusume who were<n>captivated by
the intense race gather<n>around the pair in no time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The serious look on your face when<n>you were
racing was breathtaking,<n>Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... th-thanks. Well, I'll see you<n>all around...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... There she goes. Wow, even her<n>exit is
suave and cool!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(...Guess she got all embarrassed.<n>You really
were awesome though,<n>Dober!)
